title: 200 Hryven

obverse.description: Lesia Ukrainka is one of Ukrainian literature's foremost writers, best known for her poems and plays. She was also an active political, civil, and feminist activist.
obverse.lettering:
УКРАЇНА НАЦІОНАЛЬНИЙ БАНК УКРАЇНИ

ДВІСТІ
ГРИВЕНЬ 200

За правду, браття, єднаймось щиро,
Єдиний маєм правий шлях...

Леся Українка
1871-1913
obverse.lettering_translation: Ukraine, National Bank of Ukraine, For truth, brethren, let's be honest, the only one we have is the right path..., Lesia Ukrainka

reverse.description: Lutsk Castle, also locally known as Lubart's Castle or Upper Castle, began its life in the mid-14th century as the fortified seat of Gediminas' son Liubartas (Lubart), the last ruler of united Galicia-Volhynia. It is the most prominent landmark of Lutsk.
reverse.lettering:
Двісті гривень

УКРАЇНА

В'їзна вежа Луцького замку
200 ГРИВЕНЬ 200

Київ 2007
reverse.lettering_translation: Two Hundred Hryven, Ukraine, Lutsk Castle entrance tower, Kyiv 2007

comments:
Volodymyr Semenovych Stelmakh was Chairman (Governor) of the Bank of Ukraine from 2000 until 2002 and from 2004 until 2010
Serhiy Hennadiiovych Arbuzov was Chairman (Governor) of the Bank of Ukraine from 2010 until 2012
Ihor Viacheslavovych Sorkin was Chairman (Governor) of the Bank of Ukraine from 2013 until 2014
Stepan Kubiv was Chairman (Governor) of the Bank of Ukraine in 2014
Valeriya Oleksiivna Hontareva was Chairman (Governor) of the Bank of Ukraine from 2014 until May 11, 2017

watermark.description: Lesia Ukrainka and symbol of Hryvnia after 200

printers.name: Banknote Printing and Minting Works of the National Bank of Ukraine
